datasets.name: ds_predictions_all
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(confidence_level * 100, 0) AS confidence_pct, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error, forecast_generated_at FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions ORDER BY forecast_generated_at DESC, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_ed_predictions
queryLines: SELECT target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(confidence_level * 100, 0) AS confidence_pct, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ED' AND forecast_generated_at = (SELECT MAX(forecast_generated_at) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions) ORDER BY target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_icu_predictions
queryLines: SELECT target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(confidence_level * 100, 0) AS confidence_pct, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ICU' AND forecast_generated_at = (SELECT MAX(forecast_generated_at) FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions) ORDER BY target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_pred_timeline_ed
queryLines: SELECT target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ED' AND target_metric = 'arrivals' AND forecast_horizon_hours = 1 ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds_pred_timeline_icu
queryLines: SELECT target_hour, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(prediction_lower_bound, 1) AS lower_bound, ROUND(prediction_upper_bound, 1) AS upper_bound, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE department = 'ICU' AND target_metric = 'arrivals' AND forecast_horizon_hours = 1 ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds_pred_vs_actual
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, CAST(forecast_horizon_hours AS STRING) AS horizon, ROUND(predicted_value, 1) AS predicted_value, ROUND(actual_value, 1) AS actual_value, ROUND(absolute_error, 2) AS absolute_error FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE actual_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY target_hour DESC LIMIT 500

datasets.name: ds_pred_error_dist
queryLines: SELECT department, CASE WHEN absolute_error < 0.5 THEN '<0.5' WHEN absolute_error < 1.0 THEN '0.5-1.0' WHEN absolute_error < 2.0 THEN '1.0-2.0' WHEN absolute_error < 5.0 THEN '2.0-5.0' ELSE '>5.0' END AS error_bucket, COUNT(*) AS prediction_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE absolute_error IS NOT NULL GROUP BY department, error_bucket ORDER BY department, error_bucket

datasets.name: ds_pred_by_horizon
queryLines: SELECT department, CAST(forecast_horizon_hours AS STRING) AS horizon, ROUND(AVG(absolute_error), 2) AS avg_error, COUNT(*) AS predictions FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_predictions WHERE absolute_error IS NOT NULL GROUP BY department, forecast_horizon_hours ORDER BY department, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_model_metadata
queryLines: SELECT model_name, model_version, ROUND(rmse, 3) AS rmse, ROUND(r2_score, 3) AS r2_score, ROUND(mae, 3) AS mae, best_trial_description, training_timestamp FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_model_training_metadata ORDER BY model_name

datasets.name: ds_accuracy_all
queryLines: SELECT prediction_date, model_name, department, target_metric, CAST(forecast_horizon_hours AS STRING) AS horizon, prediction_count, ROUND(mae, 3) AS mae, ROUND(mape, 1) AS mape, ROUND(coverage_pct, 1) AS coverage_pct FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy ORDER BY prediction_date DESC

datasets.name: ds_accuracy_summary
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, target_metric, CAST(forecast_horizon_hours AS STRING) AS horizon, COUNT(*) AS total_periods, ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS avg_mae, ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS avg_mape_pct, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct), 1) AS avg_coverage_pct, SUM(prediction_count) AS total_predictions FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, department, target_metric, forecast_horizon_hours ORDER BY model_name, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_models_tracked
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT model_name) AS models_tracked FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy

datasets.name: ds_overall_mae
queryLines: SELECT ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS overall_mae FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy

datasets.name: ds_mae_trend
queryLines: SELECT prediction_date, model_name, ROUND(AVG(mae), 3) AS avg_mae FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY prediction_date, model_name ORDER BY prediction_date

datasets.name: ds_mape_trend
queryLines: SELECT prediction_date, model_name, ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS avg_mape FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy WHERE mape IS NOT NULL GROUP BY prediction_date, model_name ORDER BY prediction_date

datasets.name: ds_mae_by_horizon
queryLines: SELECT model_name, CAST(forecast_horizon_hours AS STRING) AS horizon, ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS avg_mae FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, forecast_horizon_hours ORDER BY model_name, forecast_horizon_hours

datasets.name: ds_coverage_dept
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct), 1) AS avg_coverage_pct FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, department ORDER BY model_name

datasets.name: ds_model_comparison
queryLines: SELECT model_name, department, ROUND(AVG(mae), 2) AS avg_mae, ROUND(AVG(mape), 1) AS avg_mape_pct, SUM(prediction_count) AS total_predictions, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct), 1) AS avg_coverage_pct FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_forecast_accuracy GROUP BY model_name, department ORDER BY model_name

datasets.name: ds_patient_sex
queryLines: SELECT sex, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim GROUP BY sex ORDER BY patient_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_age_dist
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN age < 18 THEN '0-17' WHEN age BETWEEN 18 AND 30 THEN '18-30' WHEN age BETWEEN 31 AND 45 THEN '31-45' WHEN age BETWEEN 46 AND 60 THEN '46-60' WHEN age BETWEEN 61 AND 75 THEN '61-75' ELSE '76+' END AS age_group, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM (SELECT FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), TO_DATE(date_of_birth, 'yyyyMMdd')) / 365.25) AS age FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim WHERE date_of_birth IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY age_group

datasets.name: ds_patient_city
queryLines: SELECT address_city AS city, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim WHERE address_city IS NOT NULL GROUP BY address_city ORDER BY patient_count DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds_sex_encounters
queryLines: SELECT p.sex, e.patient_class_desc, COUNT(*) AS encounter_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact e JOIN users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim p ON e.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.sex, e.patient_class_desc ORDER BY encounter_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_visit_freq
queryLines: SELECT CAST(visits AS STRING) AS visits, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM (SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) AS visits FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact GROUP BY patient_id) GROUP BY visits ORDER BY visits

datasets.name: ds_new_patients
queryLines: SELECT TO_DATE(first_seen_at) AS first_seen_date, COUNT(*) AS new_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim GROUP BY first_seen_date ORDER BY first_seen_date

datasets.name: ds_top_diagnoses
queryLines: SELECT diagnosis_code, diagnosis_description, diagnosis_coding_system, COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_diagnosis_fact WHERE diagnosis_code IS NOT NULL AND diagnosis_code != '' GROUP BY diagnosis_code, diagnosis_description, diagnosis_coding_system ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_diagnosis_by_dept
queryLines: SELECT d.diagnosis_description, CASE WHEN e.patient_class = 'E' OR UPPER(COALESCE(e.location_point_of_care,'')) LIKE '%ED%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(e.location_point_of_care,'')) LIKE '%ER%' THEN 'ED' WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(e.location_point_of_care,'')) LIKE '%ICU%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(e.location_point_of_care,'')) LIKE '%MICU%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(e.location_point_of_care,'')) LIKE '%SICU%' THEN 'ICU' ELSE 'Other' END AS department, COUNT(*) AS dx_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_diagnosis_fact d JOIN users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact e ON d.message_id = e.message_id GROUP BY d.diagnosis_description, department ORDER BY dx_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_obs_summary
queryLines: SELECT observation_id, observation_text, value_type, COUNT(*) AS obs_count, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(is_abnormal AS BOOLEAN) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormal_count, ROUND(AVG(observation_value_numeric), 2) AS avg_value, ROUND(MIN(observation_value_numeric), 2) AS min_value, ROUND(MAX(observation_value_numeric), 2) AS max_value FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE observation_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY observation_id, observation_text, value_type ORDER BY obs_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_abnormal_flags
queryLines: SELECT abnormal_flags, COUNT(*) AS flag_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE abnormal_flags IS NOT NULL AND abnormal_flags != '' GROUP BY abnormal_flags ORDER BY flag_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_heart_rate
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN observation_value_numeric < 60 THEN 'Bradycardia (<60)' WHEN observation_value_numeric BETWEEN 60 AND 100 THEN 'Normal (60-100)' ELSE 'Tachycardia (>100)' END AS hr_range, COUNT(*) AS readings FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE observation_id = '8867-4' AND observation_value_numeric IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hr_range

datasets.name: ds_bp_systolic
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN observation_value_numeric < 90 THEN 'Hypotension (<90)' WHEN observation_value_numeric BETWEEN 90 AND 120 THEN 'Normal (90-120)' WHEN observation_value_numeric BETWEEN 121 AND 140 THEN 'Elevated (121-140)' ELSE 'Hypertension (>140)' END AS bp_range, COUNT(*) AS readings FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE observation_id = '8480-6' AND observation_value_numeric IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bp_range

datasets.name: ds_spo2
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN observation_value_numeric < 90 THEN 'Critical (<90%)' WHEN observation_value_numeric BETWEEN 90 AND 94 THEN 'Low (90-94%)' ELSE 'Normal (>=95%)' END AS spo2_range, COUNT(*) AS readings FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE observation_id = '59408-5' AND observation_value_numeric IS NOT NULL GROUP BY spo2_range

datasets.name: ds_temp
queryLines: SELECT CASE WHEN observation_value_numeric < 97.0 THEN 'Hypothermia (<97)' WHEN observation_value_numeric BETWEEN 97.0 AND 99.0 THEN 'Normal (97-99)' WHEN observation_value_numeric BETWEEN 99.1 AND 100.4 THEN 'Low Fever (99-100.4)' ELSE 'Fever (>100.4)' END AS temp_range, COUNT(*) AS readings FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE observation_id = '8310-5' AND observation_value_numeric IS NOT NULL GROUP BY temp_range

datasets.name: ds_vital_trends
queryLines: SELECT TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(observation_datetime, 'yyyyMMddHHmmss')) AS obs_date, observation_text AS vital, ROUND(AVG(observation_value_numeric), 1) AS avg_value, COUNT(*) AS readings FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact WHERE value_type = 'NM' AND observation_value_numeric IS NOT NULL AND observation_text IN ('HEART RATE', 'SYSTOLIC BP', 'RESPIRATORY RATE', 'SPO2') GROUP BY obs_date, vital ORDER BY obs_date

datasets.name: ds_allergy_overview
queryLines: SELECT allergen_description, is_severe, COUNT(*) AS allergy_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_allergy_fact WHERE allergen_description IS NOT NULL GROUP BY allergen_description, is_severe ORDER BY allergy_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_allergy_severity
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(severity_text, 'Unknown') AS severity, COUNT(*) AS allergy_count FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_allergy_fact GROUP BY severity_text ORDER BY allergy_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_order_activity
queryLines: SELECT universal_service_text, priority, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact WHERE universal_service_text IS NOT NULL GROUP BY universal_service_text, priority ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_order_priority
queryLines: SELECT priority, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact GROUP BY priority ORDER BY order_count DESC

datasets.name: ds_provider_workload
queryLines: SELECT attending_doctor_name AS provider, COUNT(*) AS total_encounters, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients, COUNT(DISTINCT TO_DATE(created_at)) AS active_days, ROUND(COUNT(*) / GREATEST(COUNT(DISTINCT TO_DATE(created_at)), 1), 1) AS avg_encounters_per_day FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact WHERE attending_doctor_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY attending_doctor_name ORDER BY total_encounters DESC LIMIT 15

datasets.name: ds_obs_per_encounter
queryLines: SELECT obs_group, COUNT(*) AS encounter_count FROM (SELECT e.encounter_key, CASE WHEN COUNT(o.observation_key) = 0 THEN '0' WHEN COUNT(o.observation_key) BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN '1-3' WHEN COUNT(o.observation_key) BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN '4-6' ELSE '7+' END AS obs_group FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_encounter_fact e LEFT JOIN users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact o ON e.message_id = o.message_id GROUP BY e.encounter_key) GROUP BY obs_group ORDER BY obs_group

datasets.name: ds_total_patients
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_patient_dim

datasets.name: ds_total_diagnoses
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_diagnoses FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_diagnosis_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_obs
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_observations FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_observation_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_orders
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_order_fact

datasets.name: ds_total_allergies
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_allergies FROM users.ankur_nayyar.gold_allergy_fact

lines: Predicted vs actual values, confidence intervals, error distributions. Use filters to select department, metric, horizon, model, or date range.
Accuracy metrics over time, MAE/MAPE trends, coverage analysis, and model comparison. Filter by model, department, or date.
Demographics, diagnoses, vitals, allergies, orders, and provider workload. Filter by sex, order priority, or allergy severity.
